name: DONT PANIC DUDE!
description: Dont Panic Dude! is a fast-paced, one-touch arcade survival game that pushes your reflexes to the limit. You’re stuck on a spinning circle and must jump to dodge deadly obstacles. As your score rises, a rogue AI called “DUDE” disrupts gameplay with chaotic events, glitches, and surprises. Features: Simple Controls: Tap or click to jump—easy to learn, hard to master. 40+ Characters: Unlock unique heroes as you progress. Chaos System: Dynamic events that constantly change the rules. Story & Endless Modes: Discover DUDE’s secret, then chase high scores. Can you survive the chaos? Don’t panic—just jump!
instructions: Click the Mouse Button or Tap the screen to jump
